page1.title: Fixture Title
page1.subtitle: Fixture Subtitle
page1.body: This is a test fixture passage body written to satisfy the schema validator and the word-count rule simultaneously. It contains enough carefully chosen prose to reach the minimum length requirement of one hundred fifty words that the JavaScript validator enforces on top of the JSON Schema constraints. Sentences deliberately repeat concepts like fixture testing, validator behavior, and structured data so the text reads naturally while remaining entirely synthetic in origin. The passage consistently describes the process of building a robust test fixture, ensuring that both the validator and the renderer receive predictable, well-formed inputs at all times during development. When engineers inspect this body text they should immediately recognize it as intentionally synthetic yet structurally sound and semantically coherent. Each sentence follows a clear subject-verb-object order to mimic real classroom English at an appropriate reading level for high school students. The fixture deliberately includes vocabulary of moderate difficulty suitable for tenth-grade readers who are actively preparing for the CSAT entrance examination in Korea.

questions.model_answer: 픽스처 지문의 요지를 한 문장으로 정리한 예시 답안.

textbook_tieback.body_ko: 이 교과 연계 블록은 본문 주제와 연결되는 고1 통합과학 1단원의 핵심 내용을 한글로 150자 이상 230자 이하로 간결하게 요약한다. 실제 교과서에서 배우는 핵심 개념 두세 가지를 학생 눈높이에서 알기 쉽게 풀어 쓴다. 본 샘플 텍스트는 스키마 검증을 위해 의도적으로 글자 수를 맞춰 작성되었다.

translation_ko: 이것은 문장 하나입니다. 이것은 문장 둘입니다.

vocab.example: The fixture was used in the test.
